# PINtPOINT

> Find the right pub before the first pint.

PINtPOINT is for people who don't just want the nearest pub. They want the right one.

If you care about good beer, proper pubs, and ending up somewhere worth the walk, a generic map search doesn't really cut it. PINtPOINT is a beer-first pub finder built to make discovery more useful, more local, and more beer-led. Whether you're after a cask ale pub, a craft beer bar, a decent IPA, or a route that turns into a very good pub crawl, it helps you work out where to go next without the usual faff.

The app uses a live radar interface that plots nearby venues as blips — tap one and it transforms into a compass pointing you straight there. It pulls real-time tap list data from venues that publish their current beers online, and you can filter by beer style so every result is relevant before you set off.

Launched in 2025. £3.99/year after a 7-day free trial. No ads, no data selling.

## Core Features

- **Live Radar**: Nearby pubs appear as blips on a radar. Tap one to activate a compass that points you there.
- **What's On Tap**: See live tap lists before you walk through the door.
- **Beer Style Filtering**: Filter venues by beer style — West Coast IPA, Bitter, Hazy Pale, Stout, and more.
- **Create-a-Crawl**: Build a custom pub crawl, set stops and distance, share the route with your group.
- **Beer Alerts**: Watch specific beers and get notified when they appear at your saved venues.
- **Tap Trumps**: Turn any pub into a shareable stats card with top beers and photo.
- **Discover**: Surface new pubs and bars nearby, browse beers, and add venues with a single tap.

## Special Modes

- **Ghost Hunter**: Reveals 500+ closed and demolished London pubs as purple blips on your radar. Tap any ghost to see archive photos of what it once looked like. 327 pubs have historic photos.
- **Troubled Pub Mode**: Uses FPI (Financial Pressure Index) data from ismypubfucked.com to highlight pubs under financial pressure as amber blips. Helps you support your local before it's too late.

## Coverage

PINtPOINT works across the UK and internationally. The discovery feature finds pubs and bars wherever you are. Ghost Hunter focuses on London (with some coverage beyond). Troubled Pub Mode covers England and Wales using VOA rating list data.
